items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement 'Pass thresholds and retake policy', but the provided evidence does not include any specific details or endpoints related to this requirement. The prior steps focus on other aspects of the saga lifecycle, such as offer creation and booking processes, without addressing the specific need for pass thresholds or retake policies. Therefore, it is not possible to confirm or identify any gaps regarding this requirement.
